name: Apache APISIX (Cloud-Native API Gateway)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0); Apache Software Foundation; API7.ai commercial

auth.notes: Multiple auth plugins: key-auth, jwt-auth, oauth 2.0, basic-auth

performance.notes: OpenResty/NGINX core; extremely high throughput with low latency

agent_readiness.notes: High-performance API gateway built on OpenResty/NGINX. Dynamic routing, load balancing, auth, rate limiting, circuit breaking, observability. REST API for config: curl -X PUT .../apdm/routes. Plugin system (80+ built-in): rate-limit, cors, jwt-auth, zipkin, prometheus. Kubernetes Ingress Controller. etcd for config storage. Service mesh with xDS. Faster than Kong; more features than Traefik. Popular in Asia/China.

gotchas: Lua knowledge helpful for custom plugin development
Config via REST API (no declarative YAML by default)
best_when: High-performance API gateway needing Kong alternative
Kubernetes-native API gateway with Ingress Controller
Teams wanting 80+ built-in plugins without enterprise licensing
Service mesh integration via xDS protocol
avoid_when: Teams heavily invested in Kong ecosystem
When declarative YAML config preferred over REST API
summary: Apache APISIX is a high-performance API gateway built on OpenResty/NGINX. 80+ built-in plugins: rate limiting, auth (JWT/key/OAuth), circuit breaking, CORS, observability. Kubernetes Ingress Controller. etcd-backed config. REST API for dynamic routing. Faster than Kong (benchmarks), more plugins than Traefik. Apache project with API7.ai commercial support.
